title: Claude Fable 5 sets a fluid simulation to Beethoven
summary: Claude Fable 5 generated both a fluid simulation via code and an EDM remix of Beethoven, then synchronized them. This demonstrates the model's multimodal code generation and music synthesis capabilities.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 producing a fluid simulation through generated code and an EDM remix of Beethoven, then synchronizing the visuals to the audio. It demonstrates multimodal output from a single model: code generation for the simulation and music synthesis for the remix, combined into one timed result. The takeaway is that the model handles both code and audio generation and can align the two into a coordinated audiovisual piece.
